name: Neptabyss, the Atlantean Prince
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ネプトアビス
desc: You can send 1 "Atlantean" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Neptabyss, the Atlantean Prince"; add 1 "Atlantean" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Neptabyss, the Atlantean Prince". If this card is sent to the GY to activate a WATER monster's effect: Target 1 "Atlantean" monster in your GY, except "Neptabyss, the Atlantean Prince"; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Neptabyss, the Atlantean Prince" once per turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
